raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Large mobile telecommunications providers have sold protected geo-location data of their subscribers to vendors.",
    "This geo-location data has been repackaged and sold to bounty hunters, bail bondsmen, and the general public.",
    "The sale of a subscriber's geo-location is a violation of their privacy.",
    "Law enforcement must obtain a warrant under both state and federal law to access a person's geo-location.",
    "Failing to enforce federal protections allows for unauthorized sharing of geo-location data.",
    "Mobile phone providers have verbally committed to stop selling geo-location information but have failed to follow through."
  ]
}
```
